name: HubSpot CRM
description: HubSpot CRM via HubSpot MCP server — contacts, deals, pipeline, activity

contacts.notes: Contact records contain PII — read allowed for sales role, write requires explicit approval

deals.notes: Deal mutation (stage changes, value updates) classified as write — sales manager approval required

pipeline.notes: Pipeline overview and stage reporting — read-only, low-risk

activity.notes: Activity timeline and engagement history — read-only

companies.notes: Company records — read for all sales staff, write requires explicit approval

auth.notes: Use HubSpot Private App tokens — legacy API keys are deprecated

notes: HubSpot Private App tokens do not expire — rotate on a quarterly schedule or on suspected compromise
Scopes must be selected when creating the Private App in the HubSpot account settings
Namespace prefix: all tools surfaced as hubspot.<tool_name>
PII in contact records — ensure data handling is covered in client DPA
Rate limits: 100 requests/10 seconds per Private App token (Enterprise: higher)
